name: NodeGoat A3 — XSS via javascript: URL in a user-controlled href

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real NodeGoat master code (raw {{firstNameSafeString}} interpolation into an href, with the @FIXME comment). NodeGoat ships no committed safe href, so the safe baseline (-) side uses the URL-encoded field the FIXME names ({{firstNameSafeURLString}}); hence kind=synthesized.

notes: Swig autoescape is disabled in server.js, widening exposure. NodeGoat A3 XSS. R-04 covers javascript: URLs in href/src.
